```
# App Config

[server]
host = "0.0.0.0"
port = 8080
debug = true

[database]
url = "postgresql://localhost:5432/appdb"
max_connections = 100
timeout_seconds = 30

[cache]
enabled = true
ttl_seconds = 3600
max_size_mb = 512

[logging]
level = "info"
output = "/var/log/app.log"
max_file_size_mb = 100
rotate_count = 5

[security]
secret_key = "your-secret-key-here"
jwt_expiry_hours = 24
bcrypt_rounds = 12

[features]
enable_metrics = true
enable_tracing = false
rate_limit_per_minute = 1000
```

# App Config

[server]
host = "0.0.0.0"
port = 8080
debug = true

[database]
url = "postgresql://localhost:5432/appdb"
max_connections = 100
timeout_seconds = 30

[cache]
enabled = true
ttl_seconds = 3600
max_size_mb = 512

[logging]
level = "info"
output = "/var/log/app.log"
max_file_size_mb = 100
rotate_count = 5

[security]
secret_key = "your-secret-key-here"
jwt_expiry_hours = 24
bcrypt_rounds = 12

[features]
enable_metrics = true
enable_tracing = false
rate_limit_per_minute = 1000
